name: Six King Pistol (Reprint)
effect_text: [Counter] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle.[Trigger] Draw 1 card. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 1 or less.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
